---
description: Trusted URL resources for web searches and documentation references
applyTo: "**"
---

# Valid URL Resources

When performing web searches or accessing documentation, use only these trusted
domains:

## Official Standards Bodies

- tc39.es (ECMAScript/TC39 proposals)
- ecma-international.org
- w3.org, w3c.github.io (Web standards)
- whatwg.org (Living standards)
- ietf.org (Internet standards)

## Language & Runtime Documentation

- deno.com, deno.land
- nodejs.org
- typescriptlang.org
- developer.mozilla.org (MDN)
- jsr.io (JavaScript registry)
- npmjs.com

## Package Ecosystems

- jsr.io (JavaScript/TypeScript)
- npmjs.com (Node packages)
- crates.io, docs.rs (Rust)
- pypi.org (Python)
- rubygems.org (Ruby)
- pkg.go.dev, go.dev (Go)

## Development Tools & Frameworks

- github.com, docs.github.com
- git-scm.com
- docker.com, docs.docker.com
- kubernetes.io
- vitejs.dev
- esbuild.github.io
- rollupjs.org
- prettier.io
- eslint.org

## Testing & Performance

- vitest.dev
- testing.googleblog.com

## Best Practices & Patterns

- martinfowler.com
- 12factor.net
- microservices.io
- lawsofux.com
- writethedocs.org
- plainlanguage.gov
